title.rendered: Day 22 of $QQQ short term up-trend; GMI=GREEN

content.rendered: The 10 week average is back above its 30 week average. GMI = 6.

GMI is red. I am in cash. Patience.

Here is a long discussion of why I use the 30 week moving average and how the General Market Index works across six components and what each one means and why I wait for confirmation before committing capital to the market in size, etc etc, padding this body past the long-form word threshold so the heuristic classifies it as long-form rather than a daily update or unknown. More words. And more. Several more sentences here to be safe about the count. Filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler filler.
